text.title: Claude API Integration Failure Modes
text.summary: 5 antipatterns observed when wiring the full Claude integration. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), root cause (`reason`), and corrective fix (`note`).

antipattern.description: Multi-turn pipeline 400s on the second turn whenever a tool was used.
antipattern.reason: Caller appended only the assistant TEXT (or a summary), omitting `tool_use` blocks from `response.content`.
antipattern.note: Fix: append the full `response.content` list as the assistant turn; tool_use blocks must survive.

antipattern.description: Streamed tool call arrives with broken JSON; `JSONDecodeError` during `content_block_delta`.
antipattern.reason: Caller is parsing `input_json_delta` events inline instead of accumulating until `content_block_stop`.
antipattern.note: Fix: buffer all `input_json_delta.partial_json` strings; parse once after `content_block_stop` for that block.

antipattern.description: Cost-tracking dashboard reports zero cache hits despite a multi-call assistant; `cache_read_input_tokens=0` everywhere.
antipattern.reason: A dynamic value (timestamp, request id, JSON-serialised object with shifting key order) lives ahead of the cached block.
antipattern.note: Fix: move dynamic content into the user turn or strictly AFTER the cached block; lock JSON serialiser order; smoke-test hit ratio on first 10 calls.

antipattern.description: Extended Thinking call randomly 400s with "temperature not allowed with thinking".
antipattern.reason: `ClaudeConfig` default carried `temperature=0.2`; when thinking is enabled, the value leaks into the call.
antipattern.note: Fix: drop `temperature` from `kwargs` when `thinking.type=="enabled"` in the service wrapper; cover with a unit test.

antipattern.description: Batch API job sits at `processing_status=ended` but downstream pipeline reports "no results".
antipattern.reason: Caller treated `result.type="errored"` items as final failures and never resubmitted them; ack count never matched submission count.
antipattern.note: Fix: collect errored items into a re-submit queue; complete only when succeeded + resubmitted-succeeded equals original count.
